chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-1512 of 2025 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.7584/2025 2.For hearing of main case. 23.04.2025 Mr.Amjad Hayat, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for the Respondent. Mr.Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General. Learned counsel for the Respondent upon instructions states that the applications available at pages 73 and 75 shall be determined by the respondent expeditiously and after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. In view hereof, learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petition appears to have served its purpose, hence, it may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
